message.thinking:
We need to evaluate three questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis?
We have text: "Ievads ietver trīs daļas: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija. 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi. 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

This is introduction; not the main sections of thesis. So it does not list main sections. So answer: complies false, feedback: text only describes introduction structure, not thesis chapters. Good.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section.
It gives description of the 3 parts of introduction but not of the thesis sections. So no. So false. Provide feedback accordingly.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Since only introduction sections described, general structure unclear. So false. Provide feedback: no overview of chapters.

Thus output array with 3 objects.
